The '''Tracked Shield Disabler (TR-SD)''' was a huge single-purpose [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] vehicle, built to weaken and/or disable protective [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] around [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] bases.

This would allow other units, more vulnerable to the effects of shields, to pass through, as well as giving various forms of artillery a chance to wreak havoc on the enemy forces/buildings.

The TR-SD carried a pair of heavy [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
